Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Tender Offer (公開買付け) for Kisaragi Microsystems K.K. (TSE Growth) by Mikado Capital Partners GK
Issuer: Kisaragi Microsystems K.K.; Offeror: Mikado Capital Partners GK; Contact: deal.team@mikado-cap.example.jp; Issuer Legal: legal@kisaragi.example.co.jp
Purchase price: JPY 1,280 per share in cash; minimum acceptance 66.7%; maximum 100%; post-TOB squeeze-out via share consolidation contemplated
Conditions precedent: Kisaragi board approval per Companies Act; timely disclosure on TSE; filing of tender offer registration statement under FIEA; JFSA/Local Bureau notifications; no MAC
MNPI handling: this term sheet contains undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts under the FIEA; internal circulation limited to clean teams and insiders under company insider lists
Personal information: APPI compliance required; no collection or processing of My Number (個人番号); employee data to be pseudonymized and shared only within the data room; delete or return upon termination
Employment and integration: no involuntary reductions for 12 months post-closing; retention bonuses for key R&D staff; works councils not applicable; ordinary course bonuses to be honored
Clean-room diligence example (restricted): Mr. Daichi Morimoto (Product Manager, Kisaragi Microsystems K.K., Chiyoda-ku Tokyo office), DOB 1990-03-14, age 36, employee code EID-KIS-4319, company laptop model KMW-14 (hostname KIS-TKY-PM14), internal handle @d.mori90, VPN session ref KR-2025-0415-773, and email daichi.morimoto@kisaragi.example.co.jp must not be disclosed outside the diligence clean room under APPI
Illustrative non-identifying data points (not linked to any person): age 42, role “analyst,” a sample device model RD-300, Osaka office template, and a generic login tag “alpha-7”; these examples are placeholders for systems mapping only
Financing: Hinohana Finance K.K. to provide a JPY 6.0bn committed bridge loan (no security pre-closing); equity co-invest by Seiryu Growth Fund LPS up to JPY 2.5bn; no public offering is contemplated
Shareholder and regulatory matters: if 5% threshold is crossed, Large Shareholding Report filings will be made; insider trading restrictions apply; any press release to follow TSE Timely Disclosure rules and fair disclosure policy
Representations and covenants: customary reps including financial statements, absence of undisclosed liabilities, IP ownership, cybersecurity; data protection covenants include APPI-compliant notices and cross-border transfer safeguards
Timeline: sign definitive by 15 July 2026, launch TOB by 31 August 2026 for a 20–30 business day offer period, settlement T+3 after completion; long-stop date 31 October 2026; termination for breach or failure of conditions
Miscellaneous: non-binding except for exclusivity (60 days), confidentiality, costs, and governing law; governing law: Japan; venue: Tokyo District Court; for queries contact Ms. Ayaka Senda (CFO) at ayaka.senda@kisaragi.example.co.jp or +81-3-5555-0210; currency conversions are illustrative and do not identify any person
